prompt: View all delayed shipments from 'Superior Materials' and 'Reliable Suppliers Co', including order details, delivery performance, and costs.

app_definition.app_description: Analyze delayed shipments and delivery performance for selected suppliers, including order details, costs, and delivery metrics.

components.title: Total Delayed Orders
components.sql_query: SELECT COUNT(*) as delayed_count FROM supply_chain WHERE supplier IN ('Superior Materials', 'Reliable Suppliers Co') AND on_time_delivery = 0

components.title: Average Delivery Days
components.sql_query: SELECT ROUND(AVG(delivery_days), 1) as avg_delivery_days FROM supply_chain WHERE supplier IN ('Superior Materials', 'Reliable Suppliers Co') AND on_time_delivery = 0

components.title: Delayed Orders Trend by Month
components.sql_query: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', order_date) as month, supplier, COUNT(*) as delayed_count FROM supply_chain WHERE supplier IN ('Superior Materials', 'Reliable Suppliers Co') AND on_time_delivery = 0 GROUP BY month, supplier ORDER BY month

components.title: Cost Impact of Delayed Orders by Supplier
components.sql_query: SELECT supplier, SUM(total_cost) as total_cost, SUM(shipping_cost) as shipping_cost FROM supply_chain WHERE supplier IN ('Superior Materials', 'Reliable Suppliers Co') AND on_time_delivery = 0 GROUP BY supplier

components.title: Delayed Orders Details
components.sql_query: SELECT order_id, order_date, supplier, product, category, quantity, delivery_days, total_cost, shipping_cost FROM supply_chain WHERE supplier IN ('Superior Materials', 'Reliable Suppliers Co') AND on_time_delivery = 0 ORDER BY order_date DESC
